steps.title: Write the path area
steps.content:
The outer rectangle has dimensions $21+2x$ by $13+2x$. The pool area is
$$
21\cdot 13=273
$$
So the path area is
$$
(21+2x)(13+2x)-273
$$

steps.title: Set the area equation
steps.content:
The concrete path area is $240$, so
$$
(21+2x)(13+2x)-273=240
$$

steps.title: Test the matching value
steps.content: Using $x=3$, the outer rectangle is $27$ by $19$: $$ 27\cdot 19-273=513-273=240 $$ This matches the given path area. The answer is A.
